description_long: This cabinetry unit features a modern, modular design with a combination of closed storage compartments, open shelving, and a built-in desk area. The upper section includes multiple light wood cabinet doors with subtle, handle-less fronts, while the lower section incorporates a dark stone or marble-like countertop and additional storage. The right side of the unit is composed of large, solid white panels, likely concealing more storage or appliances. The desk area extends outward, supported by a pedestal and featuring a matching stone surface. The overall color palette is a mix of white, light wood, and dark gray, giving it a contemporary and clean appearance. This cabinetry is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or communal workspaces.
description: A modern modular cabinetry unit with light wood cabinets, white panels, and a built-in desk with a dark stone surface. Features both closed and open storage, suitable for office or communal urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cabinetry layout, including upper cabinets, open shelving, and the built-in desk with stone surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry and the protruding desk area, with the pedestal support visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid white back panels, with no visible openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back, showing the open space beneath the desk and the arrangement of the cabinetry components.
attribute_door_configuration: multiple single doors with open shelf and desk
